creator: andrew@tao11.riddles.org.uk
text:
(In reply to Hiroo Ono from comment #9)

Now that github isn't broken, it's clear that the issue with devel/breakpad is that the file size and/or checksum has changed (which is a common issue with ports that just fetch a github snapshot). Updating the distinfo should be sufficient, but given that the port is nearly 3 years out of date it may require more attention than that.
